blocks.translation: CHAPTER 199
SCHOLAR SWORDSMAN RECORDS

blocks.text: tus  visitas  NOS  AYUDAN  para  Administrar el  scan ,  solo  subimos  en  la  web  OFICIAL ZONAOLYMPUS.COM
blocks.translation: Your visits help us manage the scan; we only upload on the official site ZONAOLYMPUS.COM

blocks.text: Nos  vemos  en  un Proximo  capitulo ,  gracias por  leer  en  Olympus .
blocks.translation: See you in the next chapter, thanks for reading on Olympus.
TITLE: DEMONIC EVOLUTION

blocks.text: EN  ESE  MOMENTO ,  TODA  LA CIUDAD  ESTABA  ALBOROTADA  CON  EL NOMBRE  DEL  SEÑOR  DE  LA  ESPADA DEL  DRAGÓN  AZUL .
blocks.translation: AT THAT MOMENT, THE WHOLE CITY WAS BUZZING WITH THE NAME OF THE LORD OF THE BLUE DRAGON SWORD.

blocks.text: DE  HECHO ,  UNHYEON  ESTABA  EN  SU ALOJAMIENTO  CLASIFICANDO  LA  INFORMACIÓN RECOPILADA  POR  JOGWAN ,  HANG  JANGIK  Y  DAM SOHA .
blocks.translation: IN FACT, UNHYEON WAS IN HIS ROOM SORTING THROUGH THE INFORMATION GATHERED BY JOGWAN, HANG JANGIK, AND DAM SOHA.

blocks.text: HMM ,  LA  SOCIEDAD DEL  DRAGÓN  AZUL ...
blocks.translation: HMM, THE BLUE DRAGON SOCIETY...

blocks.text: ¿ ES  ESTO  QUIZÁS  UNA ORGANIZACIÓN  SECRETA CREADA  POR  USTED ,  O ALGO  ASI ?
blocks.translation: COULD THIS BE A SECRET ORGANIZATION YOU CREATED, OR SOMETHING LIKE THAT?

blocks.text: NO ,  NUNCA  HE HECHO  TAL  COSA .
blocks.translation: No, I've never done such a thing.

blocks.text: PERO  DICEN  QUE  SON  UN GRUPO  QUE  SIGUE  LA  VOLUNTAD DEL  SEÑOR  DE  LA  ESPADA  DEL DRAGÓN  AZUL ,  ¿ NO ?
blocks.translation: But they say it's a group that follows the will of the Blue Dragon Sword Lord, right?

blocks.text: SE  DIERON  A  CONOCER  A  RAÍZ DEL  INCIDENTE  DEL  TENIENTE  DE  LA PROVINCIA  DE  GUIZHOU ,  Y  DESDE ENTONCES  HAN  ESTADO  INTENTANDO UNA  RESISTENCIA  ESPORÁDICA CONTRA  LA  LIGA  DE  HÉROES ...
blocks.translation: They came to light after the Guizhou province lieutenant incident, and since then they've sporadically resisted the Heroes' League...

blocks.text: TAMBIÉN  HAY  MUCHOS  CASOS EN  LOS  QUE  LA  IDENTIDAD  NO  ES CLARA ,  POR  LO  QUE  NO  SE  PUEDE CONFIRMAR  SI  EL  CEREBRO  ES REALMENTE  LA  SOCIEDAD  DEL DRAGÓN  AZUL .
blocks.translation: There are also many cases where their identity is unclear, so we can't confirm if the Blue Dragon Society is really behind it.

blocks.text: AUN  ASÍ ,  HAY  MÁS  DE DIEZ  CASOS  QUE  HEMOS SELECCIONADO  APROXI- MADAMENTE .
blocks.translation: That said, we've roughly narrowed it down to over ten cases.

blocks.text: HMM ...  ¿ QUIÉN  SABE ?  NO HAY  NADA  PROFUNDO .  NO SÉ  QUE  SIGNIFICA .
blocks.translation: Hmm... who knows? There's nothing deep here. I don't know what it means.
By any chance, miss, do you know anything?
No, but it wasn’t us.

blocks.text: NOSOTROS  NO HACEMOS  COSAS  TAN COBARDES .
blocks.translation: We don’t do such cowardly things.
Cowardly?
Yes.

blocks.text: MIRA  BIEN ,  DIJERON  QUE  NO SIGUEN  AL  SEÑOR  DE  LA ESPADA  DEL  DRAGÓN  AZUL , SINO  LA  ' VOLUNTAD  DEL DRAGÓN  AZUL ' .
blocks.translation: LOOK CLOSELY, THEY SAID THEY DON'T FOLLOW THE LORD OF THE BLUE DRAGON SWORD, BUT THE 'WILL OF THE BLUE DRAGON'.

blocks.text: PUEDE  QUE  NO  PAREZCA  MUCHO , PERO  LA  DIFERENCIA  ES  GRANDE .  EL SEÑOR  DE  LA  ESPADA  DEL  DRAGÓN AZUL  ES  EL
blocks.translation: IT MAY NOT SEEM LIKE MUCH, BUT THE DIFFERENCE IS HUGE. THE LORD OF THE BLUE DRAGON SWORD IS THE

blocks.text: MAESTRO  LINHYEON ,  PERO DRAGÓN  AZUL  ES  UN  TÍTULO AMBIGUO ,  ENO ?
blocks.translation: MASTER LINHYEON, BUT BLUE DRAGON IS AN AMBIGUOUS TITLE, RIGHT?

blocks.text: SE  PREPARARON  UNA EXCUSA  PARA  MÁS  TARDE .
blocks.translation: THEY MADE UP AN EXCUSE FOR LATER.

blocks.text: AL  FINAL ,  SOLO  QUERÍAN APROVECHARSE  DE  LOS  RUMORES SOBRE  EL  SEÑOR  DE  LA  ESPADA DEL  DRAGÓN  AZUL .
blocks.translation: IN THE END, THEY JUST WANTED TO EXPLOIT THE RUMORS ABOUT THE LORD OF THE BLUE DRAGON SWORD.

blocks.text: SI  REALMENTE  FUERA  POR  UNA  CAUSA JUSTA ,  LO  HABRÍAN  REVELADO  CON ORGULLO .  ¿ QUÉ  TEME  UN  MAESTRO  DE LA  MANIFESTACIÓN  DE  LA  ENERGÍA  DE LA  ESPADA  PARA  USAR  UNA  MÁSCARA ?
blocks.translation: IF IT WERE TRULY FOR A JUST CAUSE, THEY'D HAVE REVEALED IT PROUDLY. WHAT DOES A MASTER OF ENERGY MANIFESTATION FEAR TO HIDE BEHIND A MASK?

blocks.text: HMM ...  PERO  TAMBIÉN  HAY CASOS  EN  LOS  QUE  NO  SE PUEDE  EVITAR .
blocks.translation: HMM... BUT THERE ARE CASES WHERE IT CAN'T BE AVOIDED.

blocks.text: NO  CREO  QUE  DEBAMOS  SOSPE- CHAR  AUTOMÁTICAMENTE  SOLO PORQUE  OCULTEN  SU  IDENTIDAD . SUS  INTENCIONES  PODRÍAN  SER BUENAS .
blocks.translation: I DON'T THINK WE SHOULD AUTOMATICALLY SUSPECT JUST BECAUSE THEY CONCEAL THEIR IDENTITY. THEIR INTENTIONS COULD BE GOOD.

blocks.text: ¿ AQUELLOS  QUE  MATARON GENTE  USANDO  EL  NOMBRE DE
blocks.translation: WHAT ABOUT THOSE WHO KILLED OTHERS USING SOMEONE ELSE'S NAME?

blocks.text: PREFERIRÍA  QUE  DIJERAN  QUE ES  LA  VOLUNTAD  DE  LA  GENTE ,  O POR  UNA  GRAN  CAUSA ,  ENTONCES ACEPTARÍA .
blocks.translation: I'd rather they said it was the will of the people or for a noble cause; then I'd accept it.
IT
Though that's ridiculous too.

blocks.text: POR  MUY  MALVADOS  QUE SEAN ,  MATARON  GENTE  USANDO EL  NOMBRE  DEL  MAESTRO UNHYEON .
blocks.translation: No matter how evil they are, they killed people using Master Unhyeon's name.

blocks.text: ¿ ESAS  PERSONAS QUE  CULPAN  A  OTROS , CREES  QUE  TIENEN  BUENAS INTENCIONES ?
blocks.translation: Those who blame others—do you think they mean well?
... Every word is true.
I assure you

blocks.text: QUE ESTAS  PERSONAS  NUNCA INTENTARÁN  CONTACTAR  AL MAESTRO  UNHYEON , ¿ VERDAD ?
blocks.translation: these people will never try to contact Master Unhyeon, right?

blocks.text: ESO  ES ,  ANTES  DE  QUE  OB- TENGAN  UN  PODER  SEGURO . SI  NO  ME  CREES ,  PUEDES APOSTAR .
blocks.translation: That's right, before they gain real power. If you don't believe me, you can bet on it.

blocks.text: ¿ POR  QUÉ  HARÍAMOS UNA  APUESTA  QUE  ES OBVIO  QUE  VAMOS  A PERDER ?
blocks.translation: Why would we bet on something we obviously will lose?

blocks.text: MAESTRO  UNHYEON , ¿ REALMENTE  NO  ES USTED ?
blocks.translation: Master Unhyeon, are you really not the one?

blocks.text: NO ,  NO  TENGO NADA  QUE  VER .
blocks.translation: No, I have nothing to do with it.
Then

blocks.text: ES  MEJOR QUE  MANTENGA  DISTANCIA DE  ELLOS .
blocks.translation: It's best to keep your distance from them.
30 Blue Dragon Alliance
Also

blocks.text: SERÍA  BUENO  QUE  DE- CLARARA  PÚBLICAMENTE  QUE  NO TIENE  NADA  QUE  VER  CON  USTED .
blocks.translation: It would be wise to publicly declare you have nothing to do with them.

blocks.text: SI  ELLOS  INTENTAN CONTACTARLO ,  PRIMERO  EXIJA FIRMEMENTE  SU  DISOLUCIÓN .
blocks.translation: If they try to contact you, demand their disbandment first.

blocks.text: SI  MUESTRA  UNA  ACTITUD  AMBIGUA , SERÁ  VENDIDO  COMO  UNO  DE  ELLOS . INCLUSO  PUEDE  PEDIRLES  QUE CAMBIEN  SU  NOMBRE .
blocks.translation: Any hint of ambiguity, and you'll be sold as one of them. You can even make them change their name.
I definitely will.

blocks.text: OH ,  NO  HABÍAS DICHO  QUE  NO  TEN- DRÍAS  CONTACTO ?
blocks.translation: Oh, didn’t you say you’d have no contact?

blocks.text: ES  POR  SI  ACASO .  ¿ NO SABES  LO  QUE  ES  " POR SI  ACASO " ?
blocks.translation: Just in case. Don’t you know what "just in case" means?

blocks.text: ENTONCES ,  SI  APUESTO  UNA YANG  Y  GANO ,  ¿ SERÍAN  DIEZ  MIL VECES ?  QUIERO  APOSTAR .
blocks.translation: So if I bet one yang and win, is it ten thousand times? I wanna bet.
Before I pile on ZonaOlympus.co
What? This...!
Ah! But how’s that? You
What are you talking about?

blocks.text: ME  REFIERO  A  CÓMO ROMPIÓ  LA  ESPADA  CON UN  PALILLO  DE  PLATA .
blocks.translation: I mean how you broke the sword with a silver toothpick.
BREAK THE SWORD?
WITH A SILVER HAIRPIN?
AH, THAT...

blocks.text: SOLO  TIENES  QUE PENSAR  QUE  EL  PALILLO ES  LA  PUNTA  DE  MI ESPADA .
blocks.translation: YOU JUST HAVE TO THINK OF THE HAIRPIN AS THE TIP OF MY SWORD.

blocks.text: ENTONCES ,  SIMPLEMENTE  SE CONVIERTE  EN  UN  DUELO  DE ESPADA  CONTRA  ESPADA ,  Y  EL RESTO  ES  SENCILLO .
blocks.translation: SO IT JUST BECOMES A SWORD VS. SWORD DUEL, AND THE REST IS EASY.
... EASY?
FOR LORD UNHYEON, YES.

blocks.text: YA  ES  HORA  DE  CENAR , ¿ POR  QUÉ  NO  COMEMOS ALGO ?
blocks.translation: IT'S DINNER TIME. WHY DON'T WE EAT SOMETHING?
AGREED.

blocks.text: ¿ QUÉ  TE  GUSTARÍA PARA  CENAR  ESTA NOCHE ,  DAMJE ?
blocks.translation: WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE FOR DINNER TONIGHT, DAMJE?

blocks.text: CHENGDU ,  EN  SICHUAN , ES  FAMOSA  POR  SUS PLATOS  PICANTES ,  POR SUPUESTO .
blocks.translation: CHENGDU, IN SICHUAN, IS FAMOUS FOR ITS SPICY DISHES, OF COURSE.
UGH.

blocks.text: ESA  TARDE ,  UNA  CARTA  DE LA  ALIANZA  DE  LA  PAZ  LLEGÓ  A UNHYEON .
blocks.translation: THAT AFTERNOON, A LETTER FROM THE PEACE ALLIANCE ARRIVED FOR UNHYEON.

blocks.text: LA  CARTA  CONTENÍA  UNA  INVITACIÓN  FORMAL  A UNHYEON  PARA  LA  REUNIÓN  DE  LOS  LÍDERES  DE  CLANES , Y  UNA  PETICIÓN  DE  TANG  SEOLLYEON ,  LA  ESTRATEGA MILITAR  GENERAL  DE  ASUNTOS  EXTERIORES ,  PARA  UNA AUDIENCIA
blocks.translation: THE LETTER CONTAINED A FORMAL INVITATION FOR UNHYEON TO ATTEND THE CLAN LEADERS’ MEETING, AND A REQUEST FROM TANG SEOLLYEON, THE MILITARY STRATEGIST AND FOREIGN AFFAIRS ADVISOR, FOR A PRIVATE AUDIENCE.
PRIVATE.
Original · Un Lighting Choi Hyunwoo
Art · Park Seongwoo Adaptation · Jehaeng Musang
Chapter 199

blocks.text: SEDE  DE  LA  ALIANZA DE  LA  PAZ-
blocks.translation: HEADQUARTERS OF THE PEACE ALLIANCE-
ENTRY THIS WAY.
THANK YOU.
GHA
STAND ¡WELCOME, SIR!
AAA

blocks.text: AUNQUE  NO  CREO  QUE  NECESITE PRESENTARLOS  DE  NUEVO ,  SON EL  GRAN  HÉROE  DANG  CHEONB- YEOK ,  EL  LÍDER  DEL  CLAN  TANG ,
blocks.translation: ALTHOUGH I DOUBT I NEED TO INTRODUCE THEM AGAIN, THEY ARE THE GREAT HERO DANG CHEONB-YEOK, LEADER OF THE TANG CLAN,
AND THE GREAT
HERO

blocks.text: JEGAL MYEONG ,  EL  LÍDER  DE  LA  FAMI- LIA  ZHUGE ,  EL  ESPADACHIN NOBLE ,
blocks.translation: JEGAL MYEONG, LEADER OF THE ZHUGE FAMILY, THE NOBLE SWORDSMAN,
AND THE GREAT

blocks.text: HÉROE  MOYONG  DAN- DE  LA  FAMILIA
blocks.translation: HERO MOYONG DAN OF THE CHEON FAMILY,
CHEON,
THE LEADER MURONG,
GWAN ILGEOM.

blocks.text: Y  ESTAS  PERSONAS  SON EL  GRAN  HÉROE  GONGSUN CHUHYEON ,  QUIEN  ASISTE  EN REPRESENTACIÓN  DEL  LÍDER DEL  CLAN  GONGSUN ,
blocks.translation: And these people are the Great Hero Gongsun Chuhyeon, here representing the leader of the Gongsun Clan,

blocks.text: EL  GRAN  HÉROE  HYEOKRYEON  PIL  DEL CLAN  HYEOKRYEON ,  EL  GRAN  HÉROE DANMOK  GI  DEL  CLAN  DANMOK ,  Y  LA SEÑORITA  HWANGBO  SEONHYE  DE  LA SECTA  DE  LA  ESPADA  DEL  MAR  DEL SUR .
blocks.translation: The Great Hero Hyeokryeon Pil of the Hyeokryeon Clan, the Great Hero Danmok Gi of the Danmok Clan, and Miss Hwangbo Seonhye from the Southern Sea Sword Sect.

blocks.text: EL  GRAN  HÉROE  ZHUGE GIHO ,  EL  ESTRATEGA  GENE- RAL  DE  ASUNTOS  INTERNOS DE  LA  ALIANZA  DE  LA  PAZ .
blocks.translation: The Great Hero Zhuge Giho, Chief Strategist of Internal Affairs for the Peace Alliance.

blocks.text: YO  SOY  TANG  SEOLLYEON , Y  ESTOY  A  CARGO  DE  LA ESTRATEGIA  GENERAL  DE ASUNTOS  EXTERNOS .
blocks.translation: I am Tang Seollyeon, in charge of the overall foreign affairs strategy.

blocks.text: Y ,  COMO  TODOS  YA  SABRÁN ,  ÉL  ES EL  SEÑOR  UNHYEON ,  EL  REPRESEN- TANTE  PLENIPOTENCIARIO  DEL EUNUCO  PARK .
blocks.translation: And, as you all know, he is Lord Unhyeon, the plenipotentiary representative of Eunuch Park.

blocks.text: UNA  VEZ  OCUPÓ  EL  CARGO  DE SECRETARIO  EN  LA  ALIANZA MURIM ...
blocks.translation: He once served as secretary of the Murim Alliance...

blocks.text: ES  EL  DISCIPULO  MENOR DEL  MONJE  DIVINO  Y  ES  MÁS CONOCIDO  POR  EL  TÍTULO  DE MAESTRO  DE  LA  ESPADA DRAGÓN  AZUL .
blocks.translation: He is the youngest disciple of the Divine Monk, better known as the Blue Dragon Sword Master.
A pleasure, I am Unhyeon.
Please, have a seat here.

blocks.text: AL  LADO  DE  LOS LIDERES  DE  LOS CLANES ...
blocks.translation: Next to the clan leaders...

blocks.text: NO  SE  SI  ES  POR  CORTESIA  HACIA RIO ,  O  SI  ES  POR  CONSIDERACIÓN  A EL  REPRESENTANTE  PLENIPOTENCIA-
blocks.translation: I don't know if it's out of courtesy to Rio, or respect for the plenipotentiary representative—

blocks.text: SU  POSICIÓN  COMO  DISCIPULO MENOR  DEL  MONJE  DIVINO .
blocks.translation: or his position as the junior disciple of the Divine Monk.
(sound of small footsteps)
Thank you.
You're welcome.
It's a really good tea.

blocks.text: ES  UNA  ESPECIALIDAD DE  SICHUAN  DIGNA  DE  UN INVITADO
blocks.translation: A Sichuan specialty worthy of an honored guest.
Thank you for accepting the invitation, Mr. Unhyeon.

blocks.text: GRACIAS  POR  ACEPTAR LA  INVITACIÓN ,  SEÑOR UNHYEON .
DE  NADA .  SOY  YO  QUIEN  LE AGRADECE  POR  INVITARME  A  UN LUGAR  TAN  DISTINGUIDO .
blocks.translation: You're welcome. I'm the one who should thank you for inviting me to such a distinguished place.

blocks.text: ME  RECUERDA  A  LA  AN- TIGUA  ALIANZA  MURIM .
blocks.translation: It reminds me of the old Murim Alliance.

blocks.text: AUNQUE  EN  AQUEL  EN- TONCES  EL  AMBIENTE  NO ERA  TAN
blocks.translation: Although back then, the atmosphere wasn't nearly as good as this.
ARE YOU AN OFFICER, SIR?
... YOU COULD SAY THAT.

blocks.text: ¿ DESDE  CUANDO ?  ¿ ACASO TAMBIÉN  ERA  ASÍ  EN  LA  AN- TIGUA  ALIANZA  MURIM ?
blocks.translation: SINCE WHEN? WERE YOU THE SAME IN THE OLD MURIM ALLIANCE?
GONGSUN, THAT GUY?!

blocks.text: ¡ ¿ QUÉ  PRETENDES  HACER  PRO- VOCANDO  TAN  GROSERAMENTE CON  ESOS  OJOS  LLENOS  DE HOSTILIDAD ?!
blocks.translation: WHAT ARE YOU TRYING TO DO, PROVOKING ME SO BLATANTLY WITH THOSE HOSTILE EYES?!

blocks.text: SI  DIJERA  QUE  NO  FUE ASÍ ,  ¿ ME  CREERÍA ?
blocks.translation: IF I SAID IT WASN'T TRUE, WOULD YOU BELIEVE ME?
HMMPH!...

blocks.text: ¿ CÓMO  PUEDES  CREER LAS  PALABRAS  DE  ALGUIEN QUE  TRABAJA  PARA  EL GOBIERNO ?
blocks.translation: HOW CAN YOU BELIEVE SOMEONE WHO WORKS FOR THE GOVERNMENT?

blocks.text: ... ESA  PERSONA , IBA  A  DECIR  PERRO DEL  GOBIERNO ' .
blocks.translation: ... THAT PERSON WAS GOING TO SAY 'GOVERNMENT DOG'.

blocks.text: LA  OFICINA  DEL  GOBIERNO  Y MURIM  NO  SE  LLEVABAN  BIEN ORIGINALMENTE ,  ASÍ  QUE  NO ES  ALGO  INCOMPRENSIBLE , PERO ...
blocks.translation: The government office and Murim didn’t get along at first, so it’s not surprising, but...

blocks.text: DEBES  HACERLO MIENTRAS  OBSERVAS AL  OPONENTE .
blocks.translation: You have to do it while watching your opponent.

blocks.text: NO  ES  SOLO  UN  SIMPLE  FUN- CIONARIO ,  ¿ CÓMO  SE  ATREVE A  DECIR  TALES  COSAS  A  UN PLENIPOTENCIARIO  DE  LA CORTE ?
blocks.translation: He’s not just some low-level official. How dare he speak that way to a court plenipotentiary?
Gong-Sun...

blocks.text: YO  TAMBIÉN  TENGO  ALGO QUE  ME  INTRIGA .
blocks.translation: I have something that piques my interest as well.

blocks.text: ¿ ESAS  PALABRAS  SON  SU OPINIÓN ,  O  LA  VOLUNTAD  DEL GRAN  HÉROE  GONGSUNWOL , EL  JEFE  DE  FAMILIA ?
blocks.translation: Are those words his own, or the will of the great hero Gongsunwol, the family head?

blocks.text: ¿ CÓMO  SE ATREVE  A ... ? AL  JEFE  DE FAMILIA ... !!
blocks.translation: How dare you... to the family head...!!

blocks.text: EL  JEFE  DE  LA FAMILIA  GONGSUN ...
blocks.translation: The head of the Gongsun family...

blocks.text: HACE  POCO ,  ENVIÓ  UNA CARTA  A  LA  CORTE  A TRAVÉS  DEL  ANCHALSA .
blocks.translation: Recently, he sent a letter to the court through the Anchalsa.

blocks.text: DIJO  QUE  ESTÁ  DISPUESTO  A COOPERAR  CON  LAS  ACTIVIDADES DE  LA  CORTE  PARA  LA  SEGURIDAD DEL  TRÁNSITO  OFICIAL .
blocks.translation: He said he's willing to cooperate with the court's activities for official transit security.

blocks.text: TAMBIÉN  DECLARÓ  SU  INTEN- CIÓN  DE  COOPERAR  EN  TODO LO  RELACIONADO
blocks.translation: He also declared his intention to cooperate fully on matters related
to Murim.

blocks.text: ESO ,  ESO  NO PUEDE  SER !  ESO
blocks.translation: No, no way! That can't be!
That's absurd...

blocks.text: ENTONCES ,  ¿ DEBERÍA- MOS  ENVIAR  UNA  CARTA AL  JEFE  DE  FAMILIA ?
blocks.translation: So, should we send a letter to the family head?

blocks.text: COMO  GONGSUN  CHUHYEON DEL  CLAN  GONGSUN  DICE  QUE NO  PUEDE  CONFIAR  EN  MI ,  YO TAMPOCO  PUEDO CONFIAR EN  EL ,  Y ...
blocks.translation: Since Gongsun Chuhyeon of the Gongsun clan says he can't trust me, I can't trust him either, and...

blocks.text: DIJO  QUE  SI  NO  TRAEN SU  CABEZA ,  SE  CONSIDERARÁ UNA  MUESTRA  DE  HOSTILIDAD HACIA  LA  CORTE .
blocks.translation: He said that if they don't bring his head, it'll be seen as an act of hostility against the court.
T-That is...
HMM.
EILEE FIRST

blocks.text: ES  UNA  BROMA .  NO  TENE- MOS  TIEMPO  PARA  HACER COSAS  TAN  INÚTILES .
blocks.translation: IT'S A JOKE. WE DON'T HAVE TIME FOR SUCH USELESS THINGS.
BUT IT'S QUITE OFFENSIVE.

blocks.text: ¿ ES  ESTA  LA HOSPITALIDAD  DE  LA ALIANZA  TAIPING ?
blocks.translation: IS THIS THE HOSPITALITY OF THE TAIPING ALLIANCE?
I APOLOGIZE FOR THE IMPOLITENESS.

blocks.text: PROTESTAREMOS  ENERGICAMENTE ANTE  EL  CLAN  GONGSUN ,  YA PARTIR  DE  ESTE  MOMENTO ,  LE  RETI- RAREMOS  SU  DERECHO  A  HABLAR .
blocks.translation: WE WILL PROTEST STRONGLY TO THE GONGSUN CLAN. FROM NOW ON, WE WILL REVOKE THEIR RIGHT TO SPEAK.

blocks.text: POR  FAVOR ,  COMPRENDA QUE  SU  DESCORTESÍA  NO  ES LA  VOLUNTAD  DE  LA  ALIANZA TAIPING .
blocks.translation: PLEASE UNDERSTAND THAT THEIR RUDENESS DOES NOT REPRESENT THE WILL OF THE TAIPING ALLIANCE.
UNDERSTOOD. I ACCEPT THE APOLOGY.
www
THANK YOU.
WAIT! I...
A BASTARD.

blocks.text: ¿ TODAVÍA  VIVES  EN LA  ILUSIÓN  DE  SER  UNA GRAN  SECTA ?
blocks.translation: ARE YOU STILL LIVING IN THE DELUSION OF BEING A GREAT SECT?

blocks.text: LA  AUTORIDAD  ES  UN LUGAR  QUE  INFUNDE MIEDO  A  LOS  ILEGALES .
blocks.translation: AUTHORITY IS A POSITION THAT INSTILLS FEAR IN ILLEGALS.

blocks.text: SI  NO  HAN  HECHO  NADA  QUE CONTRAVENGA  LA  LEY  NACIONAL ,  NO TENDRÁN  NADA  QUE  TEMER ,  INCLUSO  SI SON  FIGURAS  PODEROSAS  DE  LA CORTE .
blocks.translation: IF THEY HAVEN’T BROKEN NATIONAL LAW, THEY HAVE NOTHING TO FEAR, EVEN IF THEY’RE POWERFUL FIGURES IN THE COURT.
ISN’T THAT SO?
IN THE END...
IT MEANS THEY WON’T JOIN.

blocks.text: LA  CORTE ...  NO ,  UNHYEON NO  PERMITIRA  LA  ILEGALI- DAD  EN  LA  ALIANZA  TAIPING ,
blocks.translation: THE COURT... NO, UNHYEON WON’T ALLOW ILLEGALITY IN THE TAIPING ALLIANCE,

blocks.text: PORQUE  ES  UNA  DECLARA- CIÓN  DE  QUE  NO  SE  UNIRAN A  LA  ALIANZA  TAIPING .
blocks.translation: BECAUSE IT’S A DECLARATION THAT THEY WON’T JOIN THE TAIPING ALLIANCE.

blocks.text: HAY  UNA  COSA  QUE QUIERO  PREGUNTAR .
blocks.translation: THERE’S SOMETHING I WANT TO ASK.

blocks.text: SE  DICE  QUE  RECIENTEMENTE HAY  PERSONAS  LLAMADAS  LA REUNIÓN  DEL  DRAGÓN  AZUL  AC- TIVAS .  ¿ QUIZÁS  TIENE  ALGUNA RELACIÓN  CON  ELLOS ?
blocks.translation: I HEAR THAT RECENTLY THERE ARE PEOPLE CALLED THE BLUE DRAGON GATHERING ACTIVE. COULD THEY BE CONNECTED TO THEM?
I HAVE NO CONNECTION.
Hurry

blocks.text: PERO  DICEN  QUE  SIGUEN  LA VOLUNTAD  DEL  MAESTRO  DE LA  ESPADA  DRAGÓN  AZUL .
blocks.translation: BUT THEY SAY THEY FOLLOW THE WILL OF THE BLUE DRAGON SWORD MASTER.
I'M CURIOUS TOO.

blocks.text: ME  PREGUNTO  CON  QUÉ  INTENCIÓN ESTÁN  MANCHANDO  MI  NOMBRE  SIN SIQUIERA  PEDIR  MI  PERMISO .
blocks.translation: I WONDER WHAT THEIR AGENDA IS, TARNISHING MY NAME WITHOUT EVEN ASKING FOR PERMISSION.

blocks.text: NO  TENGO  NINGUNA  RELACIÓN CON  ELLOS ,  Y  SUS  ACCIONES  SON AJENAS  A  MI  VOLUNTAD .
blocks.translation: I HAVE NO CONNECTION TO THEM, AND THEIR ACTIONS ARE BEYOND MY CONTROL.

blocks.text: ASÍ  QUE ,  SI  POR  CASUALIDAD  LOS CONOCEN  O  SE  ENCUENTRAN  CON ELLOS ,  DIGANLES  QUE  DEJEN  INME- DIATAMENTE  DE  USAR  MI  NOMBRE DE  FORMA  COBARDE .
blocks.translation: SO, IF YOU HAPPEN TO KNOW THEM OR RUN INTO THEM, TELL THEM TO IMMEDIATELY STOP USING MY NAME COWARDLY.

blocks.text: ADEMÁS ,  QUE  ESTOY MUY  ENOJADO  Y  QUE  NO  LO DEJARÉ  PASAR  POR  ALTO  DE NINGUNA  MANERA .
blocks.translation: ALSO, TELL THEM I'M REALLY ANGRY AND WON'T LET THIS SLIDE UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES.

blocks.text: VISITANOS  EN ZONAOLYMPUS.COM SERIES  AL  DIA  CON  LA  RAW ,  SIEMPRE  NUEVOS  LANZAMIENTOS
blocks.translation: VISIT US AT ZONAOLYMPUS.COM FOR THE LATEST RAW SERIES AND NEW RELEASES
